name: aigroup-workflow
description: Codex-ready aiGroup workflows — shared skills, AGENTS.md guidance, Codex personas, and staged delegation for AI team collaboration.

interface.shortDescription: Shared skills plus Codex/Claude Code adapters for AI team workflows.
interface.longDescription: aiGroup provides a dual-harness AI collaboration framework. Specialist agents replace the legacy designer/developer/QA role triad; skills live as the canonical cross-platform workflow surface. Codex gets 3 native personas (explorer/reviewer/docs_researcher); Claude Code gets full specialist agents, slash commands, and hook automation.
defaultPrompt: Read AGENTS.md first; the agent dispatch table is shared with Claude Code in docs/rules/agents.md.
Load skills by task intent (skills/<name>/SKILL.md), not by legacy role ownership.
Switch to reviewer persona for correctness, security, and test gaps before completion.
For build/typecheck failures, load skills/systematic-debugging in main chat — no separate persona needed.
